name: What evidence do I need for my ladder fall work injury claim?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my ladder fall work injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photos, medical records, witnesses, reports, ladder condition.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Gather medical records, scene photos, witness contacts, incident reports**.[4]

Ladders often fail from improper setup/maintenance; document ladder condition, height, safety gear absence.[1][5]

- Video ladder defects.
- Doctor notes linking injury to fall.
- Pay stubs for wage loss.

Preserve ASAP; chains of custody matter. Don't alter scene.

description: Photos, medical records, witnesses, reports, ladder condition.
